title: Keralamkundu Waterfalls
tagline: Keralamkundu Waterfalls — heritage city of Kerala

overview.short: Keralamkund Falls is located above 1500 feet from the sea level in the Kumpan mountain at Karuvarakkund near the Silent Valley National Park on the northeastern border of Malappura
overview.description: Keralamkund Falls is located above 1500 feet from the sea level in the Kumpan mountain at Karuvarakkund near the Silent Valley National Park on the northeastern border of Malappuram district, Kerala. It is one of the major water falls in Malappuram and was included in the map of national adventure tourism in 2016.

routes.byAir: Fly to nearest airport + road transfer

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Kerala Estate
topPlaces.description: Kerala Estate is a village near Karuvarakundu and Kalikavu in Malappuram district in the state of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Karuvarakundu
topPlaces.description: Karuvarakundu is a semi-urban area in the eastern part of Malappuram district, Kerala, India. It is situated 32 kilometres (20 mi) east of Manjeri, 26 kilometres (16 mi) northeast of Perinthalmanna and 30 km southeast of Nilambur.

topPlaces.name: Adakkakundu
topPlaces.description: Adakkakundu is a village in Kalikavu Panchayat, Nilambur taluk in Malappuram district in the state of Kerala in southwest India.

topPlaces.name: Kalikavu
topPlaces.description: Kalikavu is a town in the Nilambur taluk of Malappuram district in Kerala state, South India. Kalikavu, like the neighbouring town of Nilambur, is also known for its rubber plantations.

topPlaces.name: Silent Valley National Park
topPlaces.description: Silent Valley National Park is a national park in Kerala, India. It is located in the Nilgiri hills and has a core area of 89.52 km2 (34.56 sq mi).

topPlaces.name: Puttamanna
topPlaces.description: Puttamanna is a village in Kalikavu Panchayat, Nilambur taluk in Malappuram district in the state of Kerala. . It is situated 31 kilometres (19 miles) from Manjeri 36 kilometres (22 miles) from Perintalmanna and 9 kilometres (5.6 miles) each from Karuvarakundu and Tuvvur.

topPlaces.name: Edathanattukara
topPlaces.description: Edathanattukara or Kottappalla is a town in Palakkad District, Kerala, India.

items.note: Kerala Estate is a village near Karuvarakundu and Kalikavu in Malappuram district in the state of Kerala, India.

Karuvarakundu is a semi-urban area in the eastern part of Malappuram district, Kerala, India. It is situated 32 kilometres (20 mi) east of Manjeri, 26 kilometres (16 mi) northeast of Perinthalmanna and 30 km southeast of Nilambur.
Adakkakundu is a village in Kalikavu Panchayat, Nilambur taluk in Malappuram district in the state of Kerala in southwest India.
Kalikavu is a town in the Nilambur taluk of Malappuram district in Kerala state, South India. Kalikavu, like the neighbouring town of Nilambur, is also known for its rubber plantations.
Silent Valley National Park is a national park in Kerala, India. It is located in the Nilgiri hills and has a core area of 89.52 km2 (34.56 sq mi).

Puttamanna is a village in Kalikavu Panchayat, Nilambur taluk in Malappuram district in the state of Kerala. . It is situated 31 kilometres (19 miles) from Manjeri 36 kilometres (22 miles) from Perintalmanna and 9 kilometres (5.6 miles) each from Karuvarakundu and Tuvvur.
Edathanattukara or Kottappalla is a town in Palakkad District, Kerala, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Keralamkundu Waterfalls?
faq.a: The best time to visit Keralamkundu Waterfalls is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Keralamkundu Waterfalls?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Calicut International Airport, Kozhikode (47 km) and the nearest railway station is Coimbatore Junction (65 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Keralamkundu Waterfalls?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Keralamkundu Waterfalls at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Keralamkundu Waterfalls?
faq.a: Stays in Keralamkundu Waterfalls start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Keralamkundu Waterfalls?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kerala Estate, Karuvarakundu, Adakkakundu, Kalikavu, Silent Valley National Park.
